title: Fermented Crisp American Pickles Stir-fry
description: A Mediterranean-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring crisp fermented pickles sautéed with a medley of herbs and vegetables for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add sliced zucchini and red bell pepper to the pan. Sauté for about 5 minutes or until vegetables start to soften slightly.
Stir in the fermented pickles, adding a few spoonfuls of water if needed to prevent sticking. Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Fold in chopped green bell peppers and tomato, adjusting seasoning with salt and pepper as desired. Cook for another minute or two until all vegetables are warm and lightly cooked.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
